title: potentilla fragarioides var. stolonifera
intro: Potentilla fragarioides var. stolonifera, also known as Stoloniferous Cinquefoil, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The medicinal properties of Potentilla fragarioides var. stolonifera have been associated with various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to leverage its medicinal properties.
